case mp

case mpr.intro
c : Code
⊢ Partrec c.eval

case mp.zero
⊢ ∃ c, c.eval = pure 0

case mp.succ
⊢ ∃ c, c.eval = ↑Nat.succ

case mp.left
⊢ ∃ c, c.eval = ↑fun n => (unpair n).1

case mp.right
⊢ ∃ c, c.eval = ↑fun n => (unpair n).2

case mp.pair
f✝ g✝ : ℕ →. ℕ
a✝¹ : Partrec f✝
a✝ : Partrec g✝
⊢ ∃ c, c.eval = fun n => Seq.seq (Nat.pair <$> f✝ n) fun x => g✝ n

case mp.comp
f✝ g✝ : ℕ →. ℕ
a✝¹ : Partrec f✝
a✝ : Partrec g✝
⊢ ∃ c, c.eval = fun n => g✝ n >>= f✝

case mp.prec
f✝ g✝ : ℕ →. ℕ
a✝¹ : Partrec f✝
a✝ : Partrec g✝
⊢ ∃ c,
    c.eval =
      unpaired fun a n =>
        Nat.rec (f✝ a)
          (fun y IH => do
            let i ← IH
            g✝ (Nat.pair a (Nat.pair y i)))
          n

case mp.rfind
f✝ : ℕ →. ℕ
a✝ : Partrec f✝
⊢ ∃ c, c.eval = fun a => Nat.rfind fun n => (fun m => decide (m = 0)) <$> f✝ (Nat.pair a n)
